note: BRAIN layer — Day 52 (Monday 2026-05-18, Batch 5 Day 6). FINAL LINKEDIN EXECUTION DAY. Today HANDS must execute: IMAP sweep per Batch 5 lead → LinkedIn searches → connection notes → write linkedin_profiles.json same session → CHANGELOG. Reply peak has now reached 72h post-bump (closing point). Day-3 bumps assumed sent Friday 2026-05-15 (UNCONFIRMED). Day-7 new-angle sends are TOMORROW Tuesday 2026-05-19, 09:00-10:30. Copy already ready in daily_email_plan.json. No new leads today. No new signals today. IMAP gap: 44 days from last confirmed check (2026-04-04). Archive trigger fires TOMORROW Tuesday EOD for any Batch 5 lead without confirmed LinkedIn.

if_imap_finds_interested_today.action: Write to data/new_replies.json immediately. Classify in reply_classifications.json. Still proceed with LinkedIn connection note — do NOT reference email in LinkedIn note. Prepare proposal within 24h from reply time. Cancel Day-7 send for that lead — use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section) instead.
if_imap_finds_interested_today.24h_sla: Non-negotiable. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat.
if_imap_finds_interested_today.proposal_sla_example: INTERESTED reply found Monday 09:00 = proposal draft by Monday 09:00 Tuesday.

execution_sequence.action: IMAP sweep — each Batch 5 lead (NOT leads 1/3/22)
execution_sequence.notes: Per lead, not bulk. First thing. If NOT_INTERESTED: block LinkedIn + cancel Day-7 permanently. If INTERESTED: classify, 24h proposal SLA, still send LinkedIn note (do NOT reference email). If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress all channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). If OOO: note return date, LinkedIn still valid.
Primary query: site:linkedin.com/in "[Full Name]" "[Business Name]". Fallback: sector_discovery_fallback_queries in linkedin_search_plan.json.

execution_sequence.action: Check posts from last 60 days per confirmed profile
execution_sequence.notes: Post-reference notes have 3-4x higher acceptance. ALWAYS check posts before defaulting to sector template. Takes 2 minutes per profile.

If post found: write bespoke post_reference note. If no post: use monday_fallback_notes from linkedin_connection_notes.json (sector templates — direct-use). Count characters in plain-text editor before sending. Do NOT mention: email outreach, SSL, website, any prior contact.

One entry per Batch 5 lead searched (including PROFILE_NOT_FOUND). Write immediately after each search — do NOT batch at end of session. This is the ONLY confirmation mechanism that prevents archive trigger.

50+ days overdue. Must log: Batch 5 Day-0 sends (date, lead IDs, business names, signals), Day-3 bumps, fu_041-045 breakup outcomes, archive decisions (leads 1/3/22, 49/51/53/54), all IMAP sweep results since April, today's LinkedIn outcomes. Complete before Tuesday 2026-05-19 Day-7 sends — absolute deadline.

sequence.action: IMAP sweep — each Batch 5 lead before their individual Day-7 send
sequence.notes: Per lead. NOT leads 1/3/22. If INTERESTED: use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section) — reply in thread. If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel Day-7 permanently. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress within 24h GDPR Article 21.

NEW standalone email — NOT thread reply. New subject. Different pain point. Full copy in data/daily_email_plan.json (day7_new_angle section). Fill [bracketed placeholders] from 2026-05-12 send records. Expected 12-18 sends.
Any Batch 5 lead without confirmed LinkedIn (note_sent: true in linkedin_profiles.json): archive immediately as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Log CHANGELOG same session. No extensions. No deferrals.
